title: Sign in with valid credentials redirects to dashboard and shows primary content
description: Verifies that a user can sign in using email/password and is redirected to the authenticated dashboard where primary content is visible.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify the dashboard primary content is displayed

title: Sign in with malformed or unregistered email shows an authentication or validation error
description: Verifies that invalid sign-in input results in a visible validation or authentication error and does not proceed into the app.

steps.description: Fill an invalid email format into the email field
Fill a password into the password field
Verify an authentication or validation error is visible

title: Sign up from landing page with valid credentials redirects to dashboard
description: Verifies that a user can start account creation from the landing page, complete sign-up, and reach the dashboard.

steps.description: Click the option to create an account
Fill a new, valid email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify the dashboard primary content is displayed

title: Sign up with invalid or already-registered email shows a sign-up error or validation message
description: Verifies that sign-up blocks invalid input and shows an error without entering the authenticated dashboard.

steps.description: Click the option to create an account
Fill an invalid email format into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Verify a sign-up error or validation message is visible

title: Cannot submit sign-in with empty required fields
description: Verifies client-side required-field behavior prevents submission and shows validation feedback when fields are empty.

steps.description: Verify a required-field validation error is visible

title: Dashboard requires authentication and is reachable after login
description: Verifies that after successful login, the authenticated dashboard route loads and displays core content.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify authenticated dashboard content is displayed

title: Create a new team from dashboard and see it listed
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can create a team and the new team appears in the teams section.

steps.description: Fill Team Alpha 001 into the team name field
Verify Team Alpha 001 is listed in the teams section

title: Create team with invalid name shows validation error
description: Verifies team creation input validation by attempting to save an invalid team name and observing an error message.

steps.description: Fill an invalid team name into the team name field
Verify a team creation validation error is visible

title: Open an existing team and update its name successfully
description: Verifies that a user can open a team from the list, update its name, save, and see the updated team information reflected in the UI.

steps.description: Fill Team To Edit 001 into the team name field
Open Team To Edit 001 from the teams list
Fill Team To Edit 001 Updated into the team name field
Verify Team To Edit 001 Updated is displayed for the team

title: Open an existing team and attempt to save invalid updates shows validation error
description: Verifies that invalid updates to team data are blocked and an error is shown when saving changes.

steps.description: Fill Team Invalid Update 001 into the team name field
Open Team Invalid Update 001 from the teams list
Fill an invalid team name into the team name field
Verify a team update validation error is visible
